{{Location | Name=Numeria | Guid=3035-8045 | Deck=The fictional setting of The ClueFinders 3rd Grade Adventures: Mystery of Mathra, located somewhere in the tropical region of South America. | Characters=Characters/Antonio_50644,Characters/Bird_Brain,Characters/Brainstorm_50671,Characters/Charlie_50664,Characters/Chest_Monkey,Characters/Door_Monkey,Characters/Goo_Creature,Characters/Goocifer,Characters/Lefty_50667,Characters/Liverpuddlians,Characters/Monument_Monkey,Characters/Oomla,Characters/Queen_Itchybella,Characters/Righty,Characters/Sentinel_50643,Characters/Spit_Spot,Characters/The_Bat,Characters/The_Bird,Characters/The_Centipede,Characters/The_Dragons,Characters/The_Flower,Characters/The_Orb_50670,Characters/Tree,Characters/Twin_Spiders,Characters/Vasco_de_Bongo,Characters/Vine_50654,Characters/Vine_Monkey,Characters/Yellow_Matter,Characters/Yorrick,Characters/Zep,Characters/Zoe_50666 | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Goo_Lagoon,Locations/Jungle_Canopy,Locations/Lost_City,Locations/Monkey_Kingdom,Locations/Numerian_Rainforest | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/7/73970/3464006-0562632016-latest.png}}

{{Location | Name=Nunavut | Guid=3035-8318 | Deck=Nunavut is the largest, easternmost, and northernmost territory of Canada. It was part of the Northwest Territory until April 1, 1999. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Snow | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Canada,Locations/North_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3648575-1185783376-2560p.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3648575-1185783376-2560p.png","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_super,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Nunavut is the largest, easternmost, and northernmost territory of Canada. It was part of the Northwest Territory until April 1, 1999.

{{Location | Name=O'Leary Mountain | Guid=3035-8356 | Deck=A mountain range in Oregon, USA. | Characters=Characters/Boozer,Characters/Deacon_St_John | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Mountains,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732349-img_4129.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Ocean Planet | Guid=3035-8159 | Deck=The '''Ocean Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Ray Fillet is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Ocean Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Ray Fillet is fought.

{{Location | Name=Odar | Guid=3035-8176 | Deck=Odar is a fictional planet from the 1990 video game The Adventures of Rad Gravity. The planet has an underground maze. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Odar is a fictional planet from the 1990 video game The Adventures of Rad Gravity. The planet has an underground maze.

{{Location | Name=Office | Guid=3035-8121 | Deck=An office is a room or other area in which people work, or a position within an organization with specific duties and rights attached. | Characters=Characters/Retsuko | Concepts=Concepts/Interior_Decorating,Concepts/Source_Engine | Objects=Objects/Computer,Objects/Office_Chair,Objects/Table | Locations=Locations/cs_office,Locations/Office_Building | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3517064-8805928946-.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Oxford | Guid=3035-8251 | Deck=A city in Mississippi and the home of the University of Mississippi, which is better known as Ole Miss. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Ole_Miss_Rebels | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Mississippi,Locations/Southern_United_States,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614371-7611140148-Oxfor.png}}

{{Location | Name=Oxnard | Guid=3035-8323 | Deck=Oxnard is a city in Ventura County, California. It is known for its rich farm land, beaches, and occasional gang activity. | Characters=Characters/Anderson_Paak,Characters/Tony_Ferguson | Concepts=Concepts/Gangs,Concepts/Lawbreaking,Concepts/Military,Concepts/Police,Concepts/United_States_Air_Force,Concepts/United_States_Army,Concepts/United_States_National_Guard,Concepts/United_States_Navy | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/Burger_King,Locations/California,Locations/Church,Locations/Earth,Locations/Factory,Locations/Farm,Locations/Gas_Station,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/Military_Base,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/Subway_3715,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/U_S_Route_101,Locations/Ventura_County,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3650583-plaza-park-oxnard_brallan-perez-favela-2-1024x682.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3650583-plaza-park-oxnard_brallan-perez-favela-2-1024x682.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Oxnard is a city in Ventura County, California. It is known for its rich farm land, beaches, and occasional gang activity.

{{Location | Name=Pangya Island | Guid=3035-8285 | Deck=Pangya Island is a beautiful location where all golfers played for their tournament. | Characters=Characters/Arin,Characters/Azer,Characters/Cecilia_8385,Characters/Kooh,Characters/Lucia_55229,Characters/Max_55230,Characters/Nuri | Concepts=Concepts/Golf,Concepts/Tournament | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3613257-img_2480.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3613257-img_2480.png","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_mini,square_medium,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Pangya Island is a beautiful location where all golfers played for their tournament.

{{Location | Name=Panthalassa Junction | Guid=3035-7970 | Deck=Derelict series of roads that was once a part of a bustling civilization. Now inhabited by monsters and corrupt AI. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/20/202039/3445126-2022112723075500-e0a513f2ff231ca5e32e8423db190112.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3445126-2022112723075500-e0a513f2ff231ca5e32e8423db190112.jpg","path":"20\/202039\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Derelict series of roads that was once a part of a bustling civilization. Now inhabited by monsters and corrupt AI.

{{Location | Name=Papua New Guinea | Guid=3035-7987 | Deck=Papua New Guinea is an island monarchy in the Northwestern Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Port Moresby. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Papua New Guinea is an island monarchy in the Northwestern Pacific Ocean. Its capital city is Port Moresby.

{{Location | Name=Petria | Guid=3035-7979 | Deck=A fictional nation which is the main setting for the Road 96 franchise. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Road_Trip | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/153/1539451/3448172-flag_of_petria.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3448172-flag_of_petria.png","path":"153\/1539451\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":"flag of Petria"},"background":[]}' /> Petria is a relatively small inlet nation that is said to resemble an interstate marker sign. A single journey from the bottom of the nation to its unnamed neighbor to the north through Road 96 is said to at least be 3000 miles. The bottom portion is a vast wasteland littered with abandoned gas stations, failing infrastructure, and oil pipelines, while the top portion is teeming with thriving forests. Petria is not without civilization, however, and has a few highly populated cities which include White Sands and Colton City. The nation is ruled by one party under President Tyrak, an authoritarian who firmly seized power with an iron fist following a tragic incident known as the Collapse of '86.

{{Location | Name=Petrovac | Guid=3035-8355 | Deck=is a small town in Coastal region of Montenegro | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Montenegro,Locations/Ocean,Locations/Town }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> is a small town in Coastal region of Montenegro

{{Location | Name=Råsunda Soccer Stadium | Guid=3035-8007 | Deck=The Råsunda Soccer Stadium was a soccer stadium in Solna, Sweden. It was inaugurated in April 1937, and closed down in November 2012, before being demolished in 2013. The stadium was the home soil for AIK and, many times also, Team Sweden. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The Råsunda Soccer Stadium was a soccer stadium in Solna, Sweden. It was inaugurated in April 1937, and closed down in November 2012, before being demolished in 2013. The stadium was the home soil for AIK and, many times also, Team Sweden.
